title: Remove New Relic Scripts from App Frontend
description:
## Context
New Relic scripts/pixel were referenced in the frontend application but no longer in active use. The only remaining reference was in the Content Security Policy (CSP) configuration.

## Action
Remove all New Relic references from the frontend, including the CSP entry.
acceptance_criteria: No New Relic scripts or pixel references remain in the frontend
New Relic domain is removed from the CSP configuration
No CSP errors related to New Relic in browser console
implementation_notes: New Relic was not actually loaded on the site — only its CSP entry remained. Removed from CSP.
comment_summary: Developer confirmed New Relic was only present in the CSP and removed it from there.
